text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm looking for some training books in the library
after school, when...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...Hehe.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to see Zenno Rob Roy, reading as
happily as ever.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Oh? You mean this book?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: The Ultimate Collection of Western Heroic Tales. It's actually one of my all-time favorites.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes... Um, do you?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh! That's so exciting! Stories about heroes are
just so wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Nobody starts out magnificent, right? Plenty of
heroes were nobodies at first.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But they get stronger, little by little. They
overcome all sorts of trials and hardships...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
And in the end... they come to shine in the
spotlight! At the center of everyone's attention!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I read those dramatic stories, I think about
how I'd like an arc like that myself.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I might be all shy and inconspicuous now, but
someday... I could be the main character, just like
a hero!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Which is why...
choice_data_list: You look up to heroes so much.
You look up to heroes so much.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Ah! I'm so sorry!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I just got caught up in the moment and started
blabbering on.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: So, um, what brings you to the library?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain to her that I'm looking for some
reference materials.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I see... If you don't think I'll be in the way...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Why not let me help you as thanks for listening to
me?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I am the student librarian, so I'd like to think I know my way around the books here...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After Zenno Rob Roy helps me pick out a book, I
let it absorb me for a while...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Right... Before we finish, let me share a chapter
from this heroic tale with you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Yes, I'm sure of it. This hero is really something!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
She used a rope to tie herself to a huge bull, then
trained her body by having a tug-of-war with it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe, it really is. She's truly as tough as they
come, isn't she?

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I'm training, I try to channel that same
spirit too.
choice_data_list: You really work hard, don't you.
You really work hard, don't you.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: ...I try.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Even if I'm a nobody at the moment... I'm going to
make it big someday, like those heroes. I just
know it.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
When I race, I'll show everyone that I'm the main
character of my own story!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As Zenno Rob Roy speaks, I see a strong
determination in her eyes.
